scripts.build: powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force www -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path www -Force; Copy-Item index.html www/index.html; Copy-Item styles.css www/styles.css; Copy-Item -Recurse src www/src; if (Test-Path firebase-config.json) { Copy-Item firebase-config.json www/firebase-config.json } else { Copy-Item firebase-config.json.template www/firebase-config.json }"
